evals.prompt: Write a ticket for adding user authentication with JWT tokens to the app
evals.expected_output: A markdown ticket file saved to .planning/tickets/ with title, summary, problem, solution, acceptance criteria, technical notes, dependencies, labels, and priority

evals.prompt: Create a ticket for fixing the bug where the login button doesn't work on mobile
evals.expected_output: A markdown ticket file saved to .planning/tickets/ describing the bug, its impact, and steps to reproduce and fix

evals.prompt: Document a task to add dark mode support to the application
evals.expected_output: A markdown ticket file with acceptance criteria for the dark mode feature
